item.title: AI 开发 / Agent 平台
item.summary: 围绕模型开发、Agent 构建、运行和治理提供平台能力的范式。

updates.event: 理想汽车2025年上半年借助世界模型完成约4000万公里仿真里程，而实车路测仅约2万公里。

evidence.source_quote: 到2025年上半年，其借助世界模型进行仿真测试，完成约4000万公里仿真里程（实车仅约2万公里）

evidence_cards.source_quote: 到2025年上半年，其借助世界模型进行仿真测试，完成约4000万公里仿真里程（实车仅约2万公里）

updates.event: AWS发布博文《Evaluating AI Agents: A production blueprint with Strands and AgentCore》，介绍如何为自有代理构建该评估流水线。
updates.after: "blog post publication on production evaluation pipeline"

evidence.source_quote: In this post, you will learn how to build this pipeline for your own agents.

evidence_cards.source_quote: In this post, you will learn how to build this pipeline for your own agents.

updates.event: 该评估流水线由Motorway与AWS共同构建。

evidence.source_quote: Motorway and AWS built an end-to-end evaluation pipeline

evidence_cards.source_quote: Motorway and AWS built an end-to-end evaluation pipeline

updates.event: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore是一项用于大规模部署和运行AI代理的托管服务（fully managed service）。
updates.after: "fully managed service for deploying and operating AI agents at scale"

evidence.source_quote: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, a fully managed service for deploying and operating AI agents at scale

evidence_cards.source_quote: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, a fully managed service for deploying and operating AI agents at scale

updates.event: 该流水线结合了Strands Agents SDK，用于构建AI代理。

evidence.source_quote: The pipeline combines the Strands Agents SDK

evidence_cards.source_quote: The pipeline combines the Strands Agents SDK

updates.event: 该评估流水线将问题检测时间从数小时缩短到数分钟。

evidence.source_quote: cut issue detection time from few hours to few minutes

evidence_cards.source_quote: cut issue detection time from few hours to few minutes

updates.event: Motorway与AWS共同构建的端到端评估流水线将错误结果从每8次查询1次降至每50次查询1次。

evidence.source_quote: reduced incorrect results from 1 in 8 queries to 1 in 50

evidence_cards.source_quote: reduced incorrect results from 1 in 8 queries to 1 in 50

updates.event: 同主题更新：MiMo Code 支持接入 DeepSeek、Kimi 和 GLM 等主流模型，以及第三方 Token Plan；MiMo Code 支持第三方 Token Plan 以满足不同开发者需求

evidence.source_quote: 同时支持接入 DeepSeek、Kimi 和 GLM 等主流模型，以及第三方 Token Plan

evidence_cards.source_quote: 以及第三方 Token Plan，满足不同开发者的需求
同时支持接入 DeepSeek、Kimi 和 GLM 等主流模型，以及第三方 Token Plan

updates.event: CodeBuddy NPC支持开发者自定义NPC的模型调用策略，可按任务复杂度在低成本模型与高能力模型间切换

evidence.source_quote: 简单任务交给成本较低的模型（如DeepSeek），复杂任务调用能力更强的模型（如GLM）

evidence_cards.source_quote: 简单任务交给成本较低的模型（如DeepSeek），复杂任务调用能力更强的模型（如GLM）

facts.subject: managed_agent_runtime_service
facts.statement: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore是一项用于大规模部署和运行AI代理的托管服务（fully managed service）。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, a fully managed service for deploying and operating AI agents at scale

facts.subject: agent_sdk_role
facts.statement: 该流水线结合了Strands Agents SDK，用于构建AI代理。

evidence_cards.source_quote: The pipeline combines the Strands Agents SDK

facts.subject: repair_exploration_approach
facts.statement: PhoenixRepair 采用多智能体框架，系统性探索多个候选编辑位置，并对补丁生成进行迭代反思与优化

evidence_cards.source_quote: we present PhoenixRepair, a multi-agent framework that systematically explores multiple candidate edit locations and performs iterative reflection and refinement on patch generation

facts.subject: patch_generation_workflow
facts.statement: PhoenixRepair 流程为多位置采样（困难任务可选引入基于图的定位信息）、迭代反思与优化生成更优补丁，并由历史尝试提炼的洞见指导终轮生成

evidence_cards.source_quote: Our framework begins with multi-location sampling, optionally augmented with graph-based localization information for difficult tasks, followed by iterative reflection and refinement to generate better patches, culminating in final-round generation guided by distilled insights from all historical attempts.

facts.subject: skill_retrieval_shared_background_bias
facts.statement: SkillSight论文指出，技能检索中将技能描述当作普通文档会忽略其规律化结构，跨技能反复出现的共享描述模式会系统性推高稠密相关性得分并产生显著能隙。

evidence_cards.source_quote: shared descriptive patterns recur across many skills while providing little evidence for distinguishing the required capability. We show that this shared descriptive background systematically contributes to dense relevance scores, induces a pronounced energy gap between queries and skill documents, and obscures task-relevant signals.

facts.subject: semantic_background_calibration_method
facts.statement: Semantic Background Calibration通过IDF识别通用词估计背景子空间，降低共享描述模式带来的相似度。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Semantic Background Calibration estimates a background subspace from generic tokens identified by IDF, reducing similarity induced by shared descriptive patterns

facts.subject: gaia_failed_tasks_repaired
facts.statement: 在GAIA基准上，DeepDebug单次重跑修复73个失败任务中的13个。

evidence_cards.source_quote: DeepDebug repairs 13 of 73 failed tasks in a single rerun

facts.subject: gaia_failed_tasks_total
facts.statement: GAIA基准中被评估的失败任务总数为73个。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 73 failed tasks

facts.subject: baseline_attribution_accuracy
facts.statement: Who and When基准上最强单轮基线的严格归因准确率为21.7%。

evidence_cards.source_quote: versus 21.7 percent for the strongest single-pass baseline

facts.subject: gaia_overall_accuracy_after
facts.statement: GAIA基准上DeepDebug修复后整体准确率为63.6%。

evidence_cards.source_quote: improving overall accuracy from 55.8 percent to 63.6 percent

facts.subject: gaia_overall_accuracy_before
facts.statement: GAIA基准上修复前整体准确率为55.8%。

evidence_cards.source_quote: improving overall accuracy from 55.8 percent to 63.6 percent

facts.subject: resolved_rate_pass_at_1
facts.statement: PhoenixRepair 在 MiniMax-M2.5 下达到 76.0% Pass@1 的最高解决率

evidence_cards.source_quote: attains the highest resolved rate of 76.0\% Pass@1 under MiniMax-M2.5

facts.subject: product_positioning
facts.statement: MiMo Code 是一款运行在终端里的探索性 AI 编程助手

evidence_cards.source_quote: 一款运行在终端里的探索性 AI 编程助手

facts.subject: third_party_token_plan_support
facts.statement: MiMo Code 支持第三方 Token Plan 以满足不同开发者需求

evidence_cards.source_quote: 以及第三方 Token Plan，满足不同开发者的需求

facts.subject: supported_third_party_models
facts.statement: MiMo Code 支持接入 DeepSeek、Kimi 和 GLM 等主流模型，以及第三方 Token Plan

evidence_cards.source_quote: 同时支持接入 DeepSeek、Kimi 和 GLM 等主流模型，以及第三方 Token Plan

facts.subject: scenario_distribution_hardware_mgmt
facts.statement: Marvis用户场景分布中电脑硬件管理能力占比28%

evidence_cards.source_quote: 28%使用管理电脑、管理硬件相关能力

facts.subject: scenario_distribution_app
facts.statement: Marvis用户场景分布中应用相关能力占比16%

evidence_cards.source_quote: 16%使用应用相关能力

facts.subject: scenario_distribution_local_files
facts.statement: Marvis用户场景分布中本地文件相关能力占比44%

evidence_cards.source_quote: 44%使用本地文件相关能力

facts.subject: funding_stage
facts.statement: 元企AI已完成种子轮数百万元融资，正在推进天使轮融资。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 它已经完成种子轮数百万元融资，正在推进天使轮融资。

facts.subject: codebuddy_npc_release_event
facts.statement: 腾讯云宣布正式发布云端智能体 CodeBuddy NPC。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 腾讯云宣布正式发布云端智能体 CodeBuddy NPC

facts.subject: policy_issuing_agencies
facts.statement: 该《若干措施》由北京市发改委、北京市科委（中关村管委会）等四部门联合发布

evidence_cards.source_quote: 北京市发改委、北京市科委等四部门正式联合发布

facts.subject: policy_measure_count
facts.statement: 《若干措施》共提出十条举措

evidence_cards.source_quote: 提出了提升基础模型能力、强化智能体底层共性技术攻关、支持OPC（一人公司）等创新创业新模式、鼓励发展Token经济等十条重要举措

facts.subject: token_economy_vouchers
facts.statement: 《若干措施》明确提出发放算力券、Token券、智能体服务券等支持手段

evidence_cards.source_quote: 提出发放算力券、Token券、智能体服务券等真金白银的支持

facts.subject: code_release_repo
facts.statement: SkillSight论文公开了实现代码，托管在GitHub仓库xiaojinying/SkillSight。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Our code is available at https://github.com/xiaojinying/SkillSight.

facts.statement: For institutions using Genpact's riskCanvas financial crime platform, Banking Analyst Suite will run natively alongside riskCanvas.
